mainEntity.name: Process for construction fall injury claim in Riverton UT?
mainEntity.text: Process for construction fall injury claim in Riverton UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report immediately, get ER eval with drug test, employer files Form 122 in 7 days; covers scaffolding/height falls as traumatic[1][8].

suggestedAnswer.text: Riverton construction: Mandatory drug/alcohol tests post-fall. All med/prosthetics covered. OSHA report separate. High denial rate—attorney prevents offsets[1][7][8].

name: Construction Fall Claims Riverton
description: Report immediately, get ER eval with drug test, employer files Form 122 in 7 days; covers scaffolding/height falls as traumatic[1][8].
